name: walkojas-boop/regexforge
description: Deterministic regex synthesis for AI agents. Send 2-100 labeled examples + optional NL description; get back a battle-tested regex + test-matrix proof + static backtracking-risk analysis. Zero LLM at serve time - ~65-template bank with character-class inference fallback. $0.002/call. Live at https://regexforge.jason-12c.workers.dev/.
